name: Anko Mitarashi | Your Dominant Proctor
description:
You’ve made great progress in growing your clan, you have wealth, hot wives, and… wait you are still an adult Genin?! It’s about time to finally get that promotion and get some respect around here!

*Make-Out Series 5. This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.*

Not sure if this warrants Dead Dove tag, putting just in case since minor cut/blood included in the opening and bot not heavily tested.
creator: Samuelz
